name: SUNRISE REAL ESTATE GROUP INC
business: Sunrise Real Estate Group Inc. engages in real estate development, property leasing, and property management services in the People's Republic of China, primarily in second-tier cities.

exposures.sentence: Our major business is real estate investments, property leasing services, property management services, and real estate development in the PRC.
Our major business is real estate investments, property leasing services, property management services, and real estate development in the PRC.
Additionally, we have expanded our business to financial activities such as entity investment, fund management, and financial services.
